steps.title: Close the interruption
steps.content: The dash after temperature opens an interrupting phrase: around 225 degrees Fahrenheit. Standard punctuation requires that dash interruption to be closed before the main clause, flaxseed oil will begin to emit smoke, resumes.

steps.title: Reject mismatched marks
steps.content: Choice A leaves the interruption unclosed. Choice C tries to close it with a colon, and choice D tries to close it with a parenthesis. Neither mark matches the opening dash, so neither correctly returns the sentence to its main clause.

steps.title: Resume the main clause
steps.content: Choice B supplies Fahrenheit—, which closes the interruption with a matching dash. The sentence then correctly resumes with the main clause about flaxseed oil emitting smoke. The answer is B.
